description_long: This object is a pale, round apple with a slightly irregular surface and a prominent, thick stem protruding from the top. The skin appears to be a muted yellowish-white with subtle green undertones and some brownish discoloration near the base. The apple's surface is matte and shows some roughness, with visible textural variations and a few minor indentations. The stem is fibrous and extends upward, looking somewhat torn or frayed at the tip. There are no visible stickers or labels on the surface, and the apple appears to have some areas of bruising or discoloration, especially on the lower half. The object is isolated against a plain white background, with no additional context or supporting objects.
description: A pale, round apple with a thick, fibrous stem and some brownish discoloration on its lower half.
description_view_0: Front view shows the apple's rounded shape, pale skin, and thick upright stem.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the apple's irregular surface and the stem's fibrous texture.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals more brown discoloration and a slightly flattened base.
description_view_3: Side view displays the apple's vertical indentation and subtle greenish hues.
attribute_visible_damage_or_blemishes: brown discoloration and bruising on lower half
